steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to identify the title of Singer's first published short story. Any correct answer must state the title itself.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: mentions publication venue or acclaim without naming the title. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Gimpel the Fool': names the title directly and connects it to Singer's first published short story — accomplishes the goal. ✓
  • Choice C: references a supporting detail (e.g., publication year) but omits the title. ✗
  • Choice D: describes context around the story without stating its name. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
